Name: Federal Pell Grant
Deadline_Status_Apr_2026: OPEN - automatic via FAFSA
Key_Notes: Emilio qualifies as Pell-eligible. Automatic need-based grant; no separate application beyond FAFSA. Disbursed by school at start of each semester.

Name: NASA OSTEM Internship - Fall 2026
Deadline_Status_Apr_2026: ✅ OPEN - deadline confirmed
Key_Notes: CONFIRMED open (NASA.gov). US citizen; GPA 3.0+; undergrad through grad. Aerospace engineering is prime fit. 10 wks summer / 15 wks fall. Stipend is ~$25-30/hr. Apply at stemgateway.nasa.gov.

Name: DOE Science Undergraduate Laboratory Internship (SULI) - Fall 2026
Deadline_Status_Apr_2026: ✅ LIKELY OPEN - fall deadline typically June
Key_Notes: CONFIRMED program (DOE.gov). 10-week internship at one of 17 national DOE labs. STEM engineering eligible. Fall session Aug-Dec. Paid weekly stipend + possible travel allowance. Strong NASA/aerospace connection at labs like NASA Glenn/JPL-adjacent.

Name: NASA Pathways Internship (Student Trainee - Engineering)
Deadline_Status_Apr_2026: ✅ OPEN - rolling basis
Key_Notes: Civil service pipeline internship; leads to permanent NASA employment post-graduation. Requires 15+ credit hours; 2.9+ GPA; available at multiple NASA centers (Johnson Houston; Kennedy FL; Langley VA; Marshall AL). Apply on USAJobs with keyword 'Student Trainee Aerospace'.

Name: NSF Research Experiences for Undergraduates (REU) - Aerospace Sites
Award_Amount: $5000-$8000 stipend + housing allowance at many sites
Application_Deadline: Varies by site (summer sites mostly closed; fall sites may be open)
Deadline_Status_Apr_2026: ⚠️ MIXED - check individual site deadlines
Key_Notes: Individual REU sites set own deadlines. Summer 2026 sites are likely closed. Search for aerospace/mechanical/engineering sites with fall start dates at NSF REU site finder. Many sites actively recruit underrepresented students.

Name: DoD SMART Scholarship-for-Service
Award_Amount: Full tuition + $25000-$38000 annual stipend + health insurance
Deadline_Status_Apr_2026: ❌ CLOSED - next cycle opens Sept 2026 for Fall 2027
Key_Notes: Full-ride scholarship with guaranteed DOD civilian employment post-grad. Aerospace engineering is a perfect fit for defense sector. Emilio should apply for Fall 2027 cohort opening Sept 2026. Note: requires commitment to DOD service (1 year per year funded).

Name: NC Space Grant Undergraduate Scholarship
Deadline_Status_Apr_2026: ⚠️ LIKELY CLOSED for Fall 2026; verify with NC State
Key_Notes: NASA-funded; administered through NC Space Grant Consortium at NC State. For NC residents or students at NC institutions in STEM/aerospace. Awards typically paid in fall and spring semesters. Contact consortium directly.

Name: NC Need-Based Grant (NCNG)
Application_Deadline: FAFSA-based (priority by March; late apps accepted)
Deadline_Status_Apr_2026: ✅ OPEN - automatic via FAFSA + state form
Key_Notes: Automatic for NC residents demonstrating financial need who submit FAFSA. Disbursed by school at semester start. Pell-eligible students prioritized. Free money - no essay required. Administered by NC State Education Assistance Authority.

Key_Notes: Places Hispanic students at federal agencies including NASA DOD DOE. Strong aerospace fit. Competitive. Future reference: apply January-February 2027 for Summer 2027. Students working at NASA Langley or Marshall have come through this program.

Contact SHPE national office to confirm if Fall 2026 cycle is still accepting. Strong candidate profile match.
